name: empty_interp_aux_external_body
reason: `lemma_empty_implies_interp_aux_empty` is `external_body` — the key structural induction that empty directories have empty interpretations is trusted without proof

name: empty_interp_dom_external_body
reason: `interp().dom()` emptiness depends on the external_body lemma — if that axiom were wrong, non-empty domains could leak from empty directories

name: empty_interp_aux_any_start
reason: The external_body claims emptiness for ANY `i`, including out-of-bounds — the open spec base case handles `i >= len` but the external_body is not bounded

name: page_frame_size_matches_entry
code:
proof fn phi_4_page_frame_size_matches_entry(d: Directory, i: nat)
    requires
        d.inv(),
        i < d.entries.len(),
        d.entries[i as int] is Page,
    ensures
        d.entries[i as int]->Page_0.frame.size == d.entry_size(),
{
}
reason: Page frame sizes must match entry size — tests the `pages_match_entry_size` invariant

name: no_frame_alignment_constraint
code:
proof fn phi_5_no_frame_alignment_constraint(d: Directory, i: nat, arbitrary_base: nat)
    requires
        d.inv(),
        i < d.entries.len(),
        d.entries[i as int] is Page,
        d.entries[i as int]->Page_0.frame.base == arbitrary_base,
    ensures
        d.entries[i as int]->Page_0.frame.base == arbitrary_base,
{
}
reason: `inv()` has `frames_aligned` commented out — page frame base addresses have no alignment constraint whatsoever
